title: rhinanthus wettsteinii
intro: Rhinanthus wettsteinii, also known as Wettstein's rampion or Yellow Rampion, is a species of flowering plant in the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is a hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of other plants, particularly grasses. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. Rhinanthus wettsteinii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
